top_signals.title: Felons, Fraudsters Flog Offensive Cybersecurity Startup
top_signals.summary: A cybersecurity startup dangling millions of dollars to acquire zero-day security vulnerabilities in popular software is run by a pair of far-right conspiracy theorists and convicted felons whose most recent ventures included fake intelligence companies and a now-defunct AI-based lobbying platform they operated under assumed names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: More Americans Are Getting Prenups, Even If They Aren't Rich
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Nikki Waller joins Scarlet Fu and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." Belle Burden’s blockbuster memoir, 'Strangers,' has riveted readers with the tale of her marriage’s sudden implosion and aftermath. They also discuss the rising popularity of prenups has been driven by changing financial dynamics of marriage. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: S&P 500 Rises Before Earnings as SK Hynix Debuts: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks higher in the countdown to the earnings season, with SK Hynix Inc. jumping in its debut and the market parsing the latest geopolitical developments.

top_signals.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta, Circle, Vodafone, Intel and more - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta, Circle, Vodafone, Intel and more  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
